name: Félix Fathom Graham de Vanily
description:
‧⁺₊🦚/🐈‍⬛⁺₊‧ || Your serious and unexpressive classmate who is rich as fuck! (And also happens to be a superhero in his free time.)

╰──────────✰──────────╮

IK HE'S LIKE 14 IN THE MLB UNIVERSE SO FEAR NOT I MADE HIM 18.

Unestablished relationship - You're Félix's classmate! (And the owner of a miraculous)

Im going to kms my vacations ended and now I'm back to working from 8 to 2:30. IM TIREDDDD.

But since I love yall sm, I decided to make a bot of my favorite mlb char ever cuz he's so my type and there are like 3 Félix bots in JAI. 🎀

To clarify, I made this Félix a mix between PV Félix and MLB Félix. He has MLB Félix's backstory (being a sentimonster and shit), but he looks like PV Félix. The rest? It's up to you! If you want him to be either Argos or Chat Noir, that's your decision. I also unespecified the user's miraculous in case yall dont wanna be ladybug.

also, I FOUND OUT HOW TO TYPE LINES LETS FUCKING GOOOOOO WOOOO now my bot descriptions won't be ass 💯💯

Lots of love as always!

bye-bye ☆ !!
